name: TestIndexJoinWithOrderedWindowInner
cases: select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2
select * from (select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2) tmp where rn = 1
select t1.a, tmp.b, tmp.c from t1 join (select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2) tmp on t1.a = tmp.a where tmp.rn = 1
select t1.a, tmp.b, tmp.c from t1 join (select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2) tmp on t1.a = tmp.a where tmp.rn = 2
select t1.a, tmp.b, tmp.c from t1 join (select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2) tmp on t1.a = tmp.a where tmp.rn < 2
select t1.a, tmp.b, tmp.c from t1 join (select a, b, c, row_number() over(partition by a order by b) as rn from t2) tmp on t1.a = tmp.a where tmp.rn <= 2

select p.probe_key, case when f.type_code = 4 and f.state_code = 2 then 1 else 0 end as matched, f.payload from probe_rows p left join (select * from (select i.partition_key, i.type_code, i.state_code, i.payload, i.order_time, row_number() over(partition by i.partition_key order by i.order_time desc) as rn from inner_rows i) ranked where rn = 1) f on p.probe_key = f.partition_key where p.probe_time > '2026-02-04 00:00:00' and p.probe_time <= '2026-02-05 00:00:00' and p.filter_code = 'filter_001' and ifnull(p.flag1, 0) = 0 and ifnull(p.flag2, 0) = 0 and ifnull(p.flag3, 0) = 0
